mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product_info (product_id, name, description, price, stock, image_url, category, brand, keywords, user_tags, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{productId}, #{name}, #{description}, #{price}, #{stock}, #{imageUrl}, #{category}, #{brand}, #{keywords}, #{userTags}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE product_info SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, price = #{price}, stock = #{stock}, image_url = #{imageUrl}, category = #{category}, brand = #{brand}, keywords = #{keywords}, user_tags = #{userTags}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE product_id = #{productId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM product_info WHERE status = 1

SELECT p.name as productName, SUM(oi.quantity) as sales FROM order_item oi INNER JOIN product_info p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id INNER JOIN order_info o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.status != 4 GROUP BY oi.product_id, p.name ORDER BY sales DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT product_id, name, stock, category, price FROM product_info WHERE stock < #{threshold} AND status = 1 ORDER BY stock ASC
